scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace api & npm run dev --workspace web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace api && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace api && npm run lint --workspace web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace api && npm run test --workspace web
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e --workspace api && npm run test:e2e --workspace web
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace api && npm run format --workspace web
scripts.db:generate: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; npm run prisma:generate --workspace api'
scripts.db:migrate: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; npm run prisma:migrate --workspace api'
scripts.db:push: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; npm run prisma:push --workspace api'
scripts.db:seed: bash -lc 'set -a; source ./.env; set +a; npm run prisma:seed --workspace api'
